meaning: n.噪音爵士乐(英国的一种摇滚乐)
examples: He was doing skiffle but Rory said 'I'm sorry mate, you're a bit too young'.
Music filled the family house: one grandfather had been a classical pianist, the other had his own skiffle group.
Their big break came in 1960 when, while auditioning for a TV show, they were spotted by skiffle legend Lonnie Donegan.
